notes: MEASURED cost basis (§11.2 K=16 80K-step 4-seed total 1.705 GPU-h / 4 = 0.4263/cell), linearly doubled for 160000 steps = 0.8525 GPU-h/cell (3.41 GPU-h/4 seeds, matches §11.2's own disclosed '~3.5'/'~4' GPU-h estimate). Separate outdir (/home/nvidia/ncr/results_earlyln_budget2x) is REQUIRED, not cosmetic: reusing EARLYLN_OUTDIR would hit the script's own whole-cell skip-if-COMPLETED check (ncr_earlyln_scale.py:217-222) against the ALREADY-COMPLETED 80K-step record at this exact (K,seed), returning it unrun -- the vcheck's step==160000 assertion would then correctly route the job to failed/, silently burning the slot rather than measuring anything. Ceiling is 4x the 80K per-cell rate (>=100% margin over the 2x-linear estimate).
